creator: petef@databits.net
text:
Hi Dirk,

  I am the current maintainer for textproc/pspell... just curious, why
doesn't it build for you?  I've just re-built it on one of my 4-STABLE
test machines and it's looking OK.  

  Plus, the patch should refer to ${PORTSDIR}/textproc/pspell, not
${PORTSDIR}/pspell.

Thanks,

-pete

--
Pete Fritchman <petef@databits.net>
Databits Network Services, Inc. <http://databits.net>
finger petef@databits.net for PGP key
